summary: Tested Age Gate Bug Fix and Crisis Support Website Links. Age Gate restriction is NOT working (under-18 users can access peer support due to async state loading issue). Crisis Support Website links ARE working (all 5 organizations have website buttons).

critical.issue: Age Gate restriction for under-18 users NOT WORKING - users can access peer support content even after completing age verification with under-18 DOB
critical.root_cause: Race condition - isUnder18 state starts as false while AsyncStorage loads. The condition on line 658 '(!isAgeVerified || !isUnder18 || canMakePeerCalls)' evaluates to true immediately because !isUnder18 is true (false becomes true with !)
critical.fix_suggestion: Add isLoading check to the condition: '{(!isLoading && (!isAgeVerified || !isUnder18 || canMakePeerCalls))' OR show a loading state while useAgeGate is loading

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: peer-support.tsx line 658 - Add isLoading check from useAgeGateContext to prevent race condition. The condition should be: {!isLoading && (!isAgeVerified || !isUnder18 || canMakePeerCalls) && (...)}
FIX CRITICAL: peer-support.tsx line 558 - Add isLoading check to restriction screen condition as well: {!isLoading && isAgeVerified && isUnder18 && !canMakePeerCalls && (...)}
critical_code_review_comments: peer-support.tsx: The useAgeGateContext provides isLoading but it's not being used. Both line 558 and 658 conditions need to incorporate isLoading to prevent showing content while age data loads from AsyncStorage
The async nature of AsyncStorage means isUnder18 defaults to false initially, causing the restriction to not trigger on initial render

success_rate.frontend: 50% (1/2 features working - Crisis Support Website Links PASS, Age Gate Bug Fix FAIL)

seed_data_creation: None - used DOB 2010-01-01 (age 16) for under-18 testing via localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Age Gate Bug NOT Fixed - The fix requires adding isLoading from useAgeGateContext to the render conditions in peer-support.tsx. Currently, line 30 imports {isUnder18, isAgeVerified} but isLoading is not destructured. Add isLoading and use it in conditions at lines 558 and 658.

features_tested.age_gate_under18_restriction: FAIL - Under-18 users can still access /peer-support content because isUnder18 starts false before AsyncStorage loads
features_tested.crisis_support_website_links: PASS - All 5 organizations (Samaritans, Combat Stress, Veterans Gateway, SSAFA, East Durham Veterans Trust) have Website buttons visible

rca_of_issue.bug: Under-18 users can access peer support page content
reproduction_steps: 4. Click 'I Understand, Continue' on Extra Protection screen
6. Observe: 'View Available Volunteers' button is visible instead of 'Extra Protection Active' restriction screen
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Race condition in React state hydration. useAgeGate hook uses AsyncStorage which is async. On component mount, isUnder18 defaults to false while the hook loads data. The condition on line 658 uses '!isUnder18' which evaluates to true when isUnder18 is false, causing the main content to render immediately.
rca_of_issue.fix: Add isLoading to useAgeGateContext destructuring on line 30, then update conditions: Line 558: {!isLoading && isAgeVerified && isUnder18 && !canMakePeerCalls && (...)} Line 658: {!isLoading && (!isAgeVerified || !isUnder18 || canMakePeerCalls) && (...)}
